title: Urgent Opening Hotel Manager at Postcard Hotels South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Hotel Manager at Postcard Hotels South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Postcard Hotels South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Pimpri-Chinchwad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Postcard Hotels South Asia Partners:
Postcard Hotels South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Revenue Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Postcard Hotels South Asia Partners!
